nasb.text: They have all turned aside, together they have become corrupt; There is no one who does good, not even one.

esv.text: They have all turned aside; together they have become corrupt; there is none who does good, not even one.

cnv.text: 人人都偏離了正道，一同變成污穢； 沒有行善的，連一個也沒有。

ccb.text: 人们都偏离正路， 一同堕落； 没有人行善， 一个也没有！

csbs.text: 所有的人都偏离正道，他们一同堕落； 没有行善的，连一个也没有！
